tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared squint_corrected_direction helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A single, pure, tested function that applies frequency-offset beam squint to an emitter direction.

**Files:** antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs (new fn next to apply_beam_squint_correction + tests in Beam Squint module); antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs (re-export).

**Approach:** `squint_corrected_direction(az, el, operating, pointing, feed_x, feed_y, focal_length) -> (az, el, squint_deg)`. Passthrough with squint 0.0 when |pointing-operating| <= 0.1 MHz; else compute displacement = hypot(feed_x,feed_y), clock = atan2(feed_y,feed_x), call apply_beam_squint_correction.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/coordinates_3d.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model squint_corrected", "acceptanceCriteria": ["passthrough + squint 0.0 when offset <= 0.1 MHz", "shifts direction with squint>0 when offset and displacement nonzero", "re-exported from model::mod"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refactor /gain evaluator to use helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the evaluator's inline squint block with squint_corrected_direction, no behavior change.

**Files:** antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs (lines ~166-190; remove feed_displacement_m/displacement_clock_angle_rad locals; fix imports).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model beam_squint && cargo test -p antenna-model compute_gain", "acceptanceCriteria": ["evaluator calls squint_corrected_direction", "inline displacement/clock locals removed", "beam_squint_deg behavior unchanged", "existing /gain squint tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Apply beam squint in both /h3 gain paths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Both H3 gain call sites use squint-corrected (az,el) for cache key AND compute_gain_db; remove TODO(squint).

**Files:** antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs (compute_cell_gain ~165-190; boresight cell ~301-316; remove TODO; tests).

**Tests:** large pointing offset + steered feed changes cell gains; pointing==None/operating leaves gains unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model h3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["corrected angles used for cache key + gain in compute_cell_gain", "same in boresight path", "TODO(squint) removed", "offset changes gains", "no-offset unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Surface beam_squint_deg on H3 response
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add optional beam_squint_deg to H3LinkBudgetResponse, computed once per request, mirroring /gain; document in openapi.

**Files:** antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs (H3LinkBudgetResponse line 649); antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs (compute magnitude once at (0,0); set field; update all struct literals); openapi.yaml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "openapi.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model h3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Option<f64> field with skip_serializing_if", "Some when squint>0.001 else None", "field in openapi", "all construction sites compile"]}
```
